sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4315" key="a(li/troxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλί-τροχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rushing through the sea</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>, in metapl. acc. sing. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁλίτροχα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
